arts.ttl: Burnley are guaranteed to be without eight players for Hull City challenge as injuries bite
arts.sum: By subscribing to Hull Live's HCAFC newsletter, you'll get daily updates with the biggest news, breaking transfer stories and best analysis on all things Hull City. But the Clarets, relegated from the Premier League last season, have one of the best squads in the division and head to East Yorkshire on the back of a seven-match unbeaten run.

arts.ttl: Hull City boss delivers Thomas Tuchel England verdict as club vs country points raised
arts.sum: Tim Walter has hailed England's appointment of Thomas Tuchel as fantastic after the FA appointed the German boss last week and believes the former Champions League-winning head coach can lead the Three Lions to World Cup success in two years' time. Naturally, the appointment of a foreign coach - just England's third-ever - has generated plenty of debate, both for and against, but Hull City chief Walter believes the ex-Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund, PSG and Chelsea boss is perfect to lead the Three Lions into the 2026 World Cup in the US.
